metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4518
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Neurocan localization in the prefrontal cortex (P18) was probed at the electron microscope level by immunogold labeling. Neurocan labeling was sometimes seen at the somal membrane in proximity to synaptic vesicle-containing axon terminals
Fig. 2E shows an electron micrograph of immunogold labeling for neurocan along the membrane of a neuronal soma (black arrows point to examples). Fig. 2F depicts an electron micrograph of an inhibitory axon terminal onto a neuronal soma.

Fig. 2G verifies the specificity of the antibody.. Experimental description: "C57BL/6 WT mice were anesthetized and perfused transcardially with phosphate bufered saline (PBS) followed by 4% PFA+0.1% glutaraldehyde in PBS.". p.12
